content:
How AI Is Changing Everyday Life
Press enter or click to view image in full size

AI: Artificial Intelligence. AI is becoming a very important part of our lives these days. A few years ago, it was only used by movies or big technology companies, but now it has become a part of our mobile phones, homes, offices and even our daily lives.
AI has not only changed the way we work, but it has also changed the way we think and understand. AI has made great strides in the field of education. Nowadays, students use online learning platforms where AI prepares questions and lessons according to their age. If a student is weak in a subject, AI identifies his weakness and provides him with more easy exercises.
This makes education easier and more effective.
Google Gemini, ChatGPT and other AI tools are digital apps based on artificial intelligence which are designed to make users’ daily lives easier, provide information, answer questions, write, translate and perform various tasks.
Smartphones and digital apps The use of AI has become commonplace in today’s modern smartphones.
Digital apps like Google Gemini and ChatGPT help people understand instructions by speaking or writing, and complex tasks like writing emails, extracting data, and creating daily schedules are now as easy as seconds. Business and communication entrepreneurs are also now using AI tools for marketing.
AI customer service chatbots guide customers 24 hours a day. In creative tasks like graphic designing and video editing, AI is saving customers time by completing tasks in seconds.
Automated medical diagnostic tools are helping doctors diagnose diseases faster and more accurately. This has improved the delivery of treatment, and patients are getting better facilities.
But AI also has some disadvantages. Some people fear that machines are replacing humans. AI will eliminate many jobs.
In addition, the issue of privacy is also very big because AI systems collect our data. If this data falls into the wrong hands, it can cause harm. Therefore, it is important to use AI with caution and responsibility.
We know that AI is making our lives easier and faster.
Finally, we know that AI is making our lives easier and faster. It is also helping us and changing our lives. If we use it correctly, it can be very beneficial for humanity in the future.
by summera rashid
